# jamfprotect_user (List Resource)

Lists users in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "jamfprotect_user" "example" {
  provider     = "jamfprotect"
  email_prefix = "sam."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email_prefix` (String) Optional email prefix filter applied to listed users.
